hero.title: Launch Your Career as a Full-Stack Angular & Symfony Developer
hero.text: Build modern, scalable web applications with a complete front-end and back-end workflow. Learn how to create polished Angular interfaces, secure Symfony APIs, and production-ready full-stack projects that reflect real industry standards.
hero.imageAlt: Developer building a full-stack Angular and Symfony application

courseTopic.heading: What You Will Learn
courseTopic.description: This full-stack program is designed to help students build complete web applications from frontend to backend. It combines Angular, Symfony, APIs, databases, and deployment workflows to reflect how modern professional products are built.
learningPoints: Build structured Angular frontends with reusable components and scalable architecture
Develop secure Symfony backends with services, validation, and API design
Connect frontend and backend through real REST-based workflows
Work with databases, authentication, and production-oriented project structure
Understand deployment, collaboration, and professional full-stack development practices

testimonials.heading: What Our Students Say
testimonials.subheading: Real feedback from learners who completed the full-stack Angular and Symfony journey.

items.name: Daniel Fischer
items.comment: This program helped me understand how frontend and backend really connect in a real project. It felt much closer to actual work than typical online courses.

items.name: Chiara Romano
items.comment: The mix of Angular, Symfony, and project-based learning gave me the structure I needed to build confidence and a portfolio at the same time.

items.name: Elias Novak
items.comment: What I valued most was building something that actually felt like a professional application instead of isolated tutorials. The full-stack workflow finally made sense to me.
items.imageAlt: Elias Novak, frontend developer in training

videos.heading: Program Videos
videos.subheading: A closer look at the course structure, teaching approach, and full-stack learning experience.

items.title: Angular in 100 Seconds
items.description: A concise introduction to Angular’s core concepts, including components, templates, and data binding. This video gives a quick overview of how Angular structures modern web applications and helps you understand its role in building scalable front-end systems.

items.title: Why Learn Symfony in 2026?
items.description: Explore the key reasons why Symfony remains a powerful choice for backend development in 2025. This video covers its flexibility, strong architecture, and real-world use cases, helping you understand why it’s widely used in professional, scalable applications.

learningSpace.heading: Your Learning Environment
learningSpace.description: The program is built around practical development workflows, guided mentorship, and project-based learning that reflects how full-stack teams work in real environments.
features: Hands-on full-stack projects from UI to API integration
Code reviews and structured mentor feedback
Access to repositories, exercises, and learning materials
Collaborative workflows with Git and team-based development habits
Community support and milestone-based progress

news.title: New Career Support Module Available
news.description: The program now includes additional guidance for portfolio improvement, interview preparation, and full-stack job readiness.

courseFormats.heading: Learning Formats
courseFormats.subheading: Choose the format that matches your schedule, learning style, and career goals.

formats.title: Online Intensive
features: Live instructor-led Angular and Symfony sessions
Weekly coding challenges and guided exercises
Real-time Q&A and structured mentor support
Recorded classes available after every session
Pair programming and code review workshops
Best for students who want a fast-paced remote experience

formats.title: On Campus
features: Face-to-face classes with direct instructor interaction
Collaborative project work in small teams
Hands-on labs focused on production workflows
Daily feedback and classroom code review sessions
Networking with peers and mentors on site
Best for students who prefer structure and in-person learning

formats.title: Hybrid Flex
features: Mix remote study with selected on-site workshops
Flexible schedule designed for working professionals
Access to recordings, exercises, and reusable code templates
Dedicated mentor office hours every week
Project-based learning with milestone tracking
Best for learners balancing study, work, and personal commitments

priceOffers.heading: Programs & Pricing
priceOffers.subheading: Choose the level of depth, mentorship, and career support that fits where you are now—and where you want to go next.

offers.title: Starter Path
features: Introduction to HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Git
Fundamentals of TypeScript and Angular components
PHP basics and Symfony project structure overview
Self-paced exercises and guided mini-projects
Community support channel
Access to recorded lessons and learning materials

offers.title: Professional Path
features: Advanced Angular patterns and reactive architecture
Symfony controllers, services, forms, and validation
REST API design and front-end integration
Authentication, authorization, and secure workflows
Weekly code reviews with mentor feedback
Portfolio-ready full-stack project with deployment guidance

offers.title: Career Accelerator
features: Enterprise-style Angular and Symfony project architecture
Testing strategy with unit, integration, and API testing
Docker, CI/CD, and deployment fundamentals
Team workflow with Git branching and pull requests
1:1 mentorship sessions and technical interview preparation
CV, portfolio, and job application support

teachers.name: Laura Becker
teachers.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
teachers.description: Laura has led multiple enterprise web platforms built with Angular and Symfony. She focuses on clean architecture, maintainable code, and helping students understand how professional teams structure real-world applications.

teachers.name: Miguel Alvarez
teachers.title: Frontend Architect
teachers.description: Miguel specializes in TypeScript, Angular, state management, and scalable UI design. His teaching style is highly practical, helping students move from tutorials to production-ready front-end engineering.

teachers.name: Claire Dubois
teachers.title: Backend & DevOps Engineer
teachers.description: Claire brings deep experience in Symfony, API security, Docker, CI/CD, and deployment pipelines. She helps students understand how strong backend foundations support stable and scalable products.
teachers.imageAlt: Claire Dubois, backend and DevOps engineer
